content_en:
It Is Forbidden To Hope For Death

Book of The End ; Great Trials and Tribulations 41

mercy on me. And if You wish a trial for a people, then. take me to You with death, without me being put to trial. O Allah, I ask You (to gtant me) Your love, the love of those who love You, and the love of every deed that brings me closer to Your love.” (Ahmad)

These narrations indicate that there will come a very severe and difficult time upon the people, when the Muslims will not have Jamaa’ah established upon the truth — this is either for the entire earth or some parts of it.

Knowledge Will Be Raised With The Death Of The Scholars

The Prophet #@ Intimated To Us That A Group From This Nation Will Remain Upon The Truth Until The Day Of Judgment

In another hadith, the Prophet #% said, “From my Nation there shall continue to remain a group that is victorious upon the truth; they will not be harmed by those who forsake them or by those who oppose them. (This will continue) until Allah’s Matter arrives (this is referring to when the Hour is near at hand, when Allah 8% will take the life of every male and female believer), when they will still be upon that state.”

A Narration Which Indicates That Every 100 Years, Allah 3 Will Send For This Nation He (Or Those) Who Will Revive The Affairs Of The Religion

42 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

Abu Daawood was the only one to relate this narration. Every group says that their Imam is being referred to in this hadith. Yet it appears, and Allah 2% knows best, that it is comprehensive of a group of scholars from every group and from every branch of knowledge — such as Tafseer, hadith, Figh, Arabic Grammar, the Arabic language in general, and other branches as well. And Allah 8 knows best. As for the hadith of ‘Abdullah ibn ‘Amr 4, “Verily, Allah a does not seize knowledge by force, taking it forcefully from the people; rather, He %% takes away knowledge by the death of the scholars,” its manifest meaning is that knowledge is not taken from the breasts of men after Allah 4 has endowed them with it.

Some Of The Signs Of The Hour That The Prophet # Mentioned

Qataadah reported that Anas ibn Maalik .& said, “Shall I not relate to you a Hadeeiht | heard from the Messenger of Allah #%, which none will relate to you after me? I heard him say that, ‘from the signs of the Hour is the raising (or taking) of knowledge; ignorance will spread, fornication will become rampant, alcohol will be imbibed, men will perish, and women will remain, until there remains one male guardian for every 50 women.” (Ibn Maajah)

Knowledge Will Be Raised (Or Taken Away) From Peop e At The End Of Time

‘Abdullah # related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Just before the Hour there will be days when knowledge will be raised, when ignorance will descend, and when there will be much killing.” (Ibn. Maajah)

Hudhaifah ibn Al-Yamaan 4 related that the Messenger of Allah 2 said, “Islam will perish (i.e, knowledge will perish and its traces will be effaced) like the embroideries of a garment perish, until (the time) when fasting, prayer, worship, and charity will not be known; when in one night forgetfulness will pass over the Book (the Qur’an) and not a single Verse from it will remain on the earth. A group of people will remain — the aged man and woman — who will say, “We were around when our father was upon this word: Laailaha illallaeh (none has the right to be worshipped but Allah), but they will not know what is prayer, fasting, worship, or charity.” Silah

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 43

This proves that knowledge will be taken from the people near the end of this world, a time when the forgetfulness of the Quran will pervade the earth — in the Masaahif and in the breasts of men. And people will remain without knowledge. The aged man and woman will say that they were around when people would say: ‘Laailaha illallaah,’ and they will say it seeking closeness to Allah 3% by it. It will benefit them even though they do not otherwise have good deeds or beneficial knowledge. Perhaps the meaning of “it will save them from the Hellfire” is that their saying the phrase of tawhid will save them from entering the Hellfire altogether; in that case, the only obligation upon them is to say it, since they are not required to do deeds. And Allah %% knows best. But perhaps Hudhaifah’s statement means that they are saved from the Fire after first having to enter it; so the implications of this hadith may be the intended meaning of the following Qudsee hadith: “By My Greatness and Exaltedness, I will remove from the Hellfire whoever says on any day from time: Laailaha illallaah (none has the right to be worshipped but Allah),’ But still, this last hadith might be referring to another group of people. We will study this in more detail when discussing the levels of intercession. What is important to note here is that knowledge will be raised at the end of time and ignorance will become rampant. In the aforesaid Hadeeih we are told that ignorance will descend, which means that people will be inspired by it, and that is from forsakenness, which we seek refuge from Allah 3%. The said state of affairs will continue as people increase in ignorance and misguidance, until life on this world ends. This we are informed of in the hadith of the Prophet #%, “The Hour will not arrive upon anyone who says, ‘Allah, Allah,’ and it will not arrive except upon the most evil of people.”

44 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

EVILS THAT WILL OCCUR AT THE END OF TIMES, OF WHICH SOME ARE TAKING PLACE IN OUR AGE

The Prophet #4 Spoke Of Evils That Were To Occur After His Time

“O group of Muhaajireen, five practices — if you are afflicted with them...and I seek refuge in Allah from you reaching them: (1) evil does not spread throughout a people to the extent that they proclaim it openly except that plague and hunger will spread among them, to such a degree that was previously unknown by their predecessors; (2) people will not reduce in measurement (i.¢., by cheating with scales when buying and selling) except that they will be overtaken by drought in the lands, by burdensome obligations, and by the oppression of the ruler upon them; (3) they will not refuse to pay Zakaat on their wealth except that they will be prevented rain from the sky, and were it not for livestock, they would not receive rain (altogether); (4) they will not break Allah’s covenant and the covenant of His Messenger #% except that their external enemies will be given reign to subjugate them, enemies that will take something from what is in their hands; (5) and as long as their Imams do not rule by Allah’s Book and they smock what Allah revealed, Allah 3 will make their strength to be used among themselves — against one another.” (Ion Maajah)

Tbn Maajah was alone in relating the narration and it does have some Gharaabah (strangeness) in it. ‘Alee ibn Abee Taalib # related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “When my nation does fifteen practices, calamity befalls it.” It was asked, “And what are they, O Messenger of Allah #8?” He said,

1) When the spoils of war are hoarded by some members of society only; 2) when people take for themselves things that are left with them as a trust, considering those things to be booty; 3) when Zakaat is taken unwillingly from the people (as if they feel it is a burden or tax); 4 and 5) when a man obeys his wife but disobeys his mother; 6

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 45

and 7) when a man treats his friend well but is harsh and distant with his father; 8) when voices are raised in mosques; 9) when the leader of a people is the most base individual among them; 10) when a man is honored because his evil is feared; 11) when alcohol will be imbibed; 12) when silk will be worn (by men); 13) when female singers will be used; 14) when musical instruments will be used; 15) when the last of this nation curses the first of it..at that point wait for a red wind, or the sinking of the earth, or for people to be transformed (into animals). (At-Tirmidhee)

At-Tirmidhee then said, “This Hadeeh is Ghareeb; we do not know it from ‘Alee except through this chain...some scholars have made remark upon the memory of one of its narrators, Abu Al-Farj ibn Fudaalah. And in another narration, ‘Alee ibn Abee Taalib said,
content_id:
Diharamkan Mengharapkan Kematian

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 41

rahmat-Mu kepadaku. Dan jika Engkau menghendaki cobaan bagi suatu kaum, maka ambillah aku kepada-Mu dengan kematian, tanpa aku diuji. Ya Allah, aku memohon kepada-Mu (anugerahkanlah kepadaku) cinta-Mu, cinta orang-orang yang mencintai-Mu, dan cinta setiap amal yang mendekatkanku kepada cinta-Mu." (Ahmad)

Riwayat-riwayat ini menunjukkan bahwa akan datang suatu masa yang sangat berat dan sulit bagi manusia, ketika kaum Muslimin tidak memiliki Al-Jama'ah yang tegak di atas kebenaran — ini berlaku untuk seluruh bumi atau sebagian darinya.

Ilmu Akan Dicabut Seiring Wafatnya Para Ulama

Nabi #@ Memberitahukan Kepada Kita Bahwa Sekelompok dari Umat Ini Akan Tetap Berada di Atas Kebenaran Hingga Hari Kiamat

Dalam hadith lain, Nabi #% bersabda, "Dari umatku akan senantiasa ada sekelompok orang yang meraih kemenangan di atas kebenaran; mereka tidak akan dirugikan oleh orang-orang yang meninggalkan mereka maupun oleh orang-orang yang menentang mereka. (Ini akan berlanjut) sampai perkara Allah datang (ini mengacu pada saat Hari Kiamat sudah dekat, ketika Allah #% akan mengambil nyawa setiap mukmin laki-laki dan perempuan), ketika mereka masih berada dalam keadaan itu."

Sebuah Riwayat yang Menunjukkan Bahwa Setiap 100 Tahun, Allah 3 Akan Mengutus untuk Umat Ini Orang (atau Mereka) yang Akan Membangkitkan Urusan Agama

42 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Abu Daawood sendirian yang meriwayatkan hadith ini. Setiap kelompok mengatakan bahwa Imam merekalah yang dimaksud dalam hadith ini. Namun tampaknya, dan Allah #% Maha Mengetahui, bahwa hadith ini bersifat umum mencakup sekelompok ulama dari setiap kelompok dan dari setiap cabang ilmu — seperti Tafsir, hadith, Fikih, Tata Bahasa Arab, bahasa Arab secara umum, dan cabang-cabang lainnya. Dan Allah #% Maha Mengetahui. Adapun hadith 'Abdullah ibn 'Amr #, "Sesungguhnya Allah # tidak mencabut ilmu dengan paksa, mengambilnya secara paksa dari manusia; melainkan Dia #% mencabut ilmu dengan mewafatkan para ulama," makna lahiriahnya adalah bahwa ilmu tidak diambil dari dada manusia setelah Allah #% menganugerahkannya kepada mereka.

Beberapa Tanda-Tanda Hari Kiamat yang Disebutkan Nabi #

Qataadah meriwayatkan bahwa Anas ibn Maalik # berkata, "Tidakkah aku meriwayatkan kepada kalian sebuah hadith yang aku dengar dari Rasulullah #%, yang tidak akan ada seorang pun yang meriwayatkannya kepada kalian setelahku? Aku mendengar beliau berkata bahwa, 'di antara tanda-tanda Hari Kiamat adalah diangkatnya (atau diambilnya) ilmu; kebodohan akan menyebar, perzinaan akan merajalela, minuman keras akan diminum, kaum laki-laki akan binasa, dan kaum perempuan akan bertahan, hingga tersisa satu wali laki-laki untuk setiap 50 perempuan.'" (Ibn Maajah)

Ilmu Akan Dicabut (atau Diambil) dari Manusia di Akhir Zaman

'Abdullah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Sesaat sebelum Hari Kiamat akan ada hari-hari ketika ilmu akan dicabut, ketika kebodohan akan turun, dan ketika akan banyak pembunuhan." (Ibn Maajah)

Hudhaifah ibn Al-Yamaan # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Islam akan sirna (yakni, ilmu akan sirna dan jejaknya akan terhapus) seperti bordir pada pakaian yang sirna, hingga (saat) ketika puasa, shalat, ibadah, dan sedekah tidak akan dikenal; ketika dalam satu malam kelupaan akan melewati Al-Kitab (Al-Qur'an) dan tidak satu ayat pun darinya yang akan tersisa di bumi. Sekelompok orang akan tersisa — orang-orang tua laki-laki dan perempuan — yang akan berkata, 'Kami ada ketika ayah kami berada di atas kalimat ini: Laailaha illallaah (tidak ada yang berhak disembah kecuali Allah), tetapi mereka tidak tahu apa itu shalat, puasa, ibadah, atau sedekah." Silah

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 43

Ini membuktikan bahwa ilmu akan diambil dari manusia menjelang akhir dunia, suatu masa ketika kelupaan terhadap Al-Qur'an akan melanda bumi — dalam Mushaf dan dalam dada manusia. Dan orang-orang akan tersisa tanpa ilmu. Orang-orang tua laki-laki dan perempuan akan berkata bahwa mereka ada ketika orang-orang mengucapkan: 'Laailaha illallaah,' dan mereka akan mengucapkannya untuk mendekatkan diri kepada Allah #% dengannya. Hal itu akan memberi manfaat bagi mereka meskipun mereka tidak memiliki amal-amal baik lainnya atau ilmu yang bermanfaat. Mungkin makna dari "itu akan menyelamatkan mereka dari neraka" adalah bahwa ucapan kalimat tauhid mereka akan menyelamatkan mereka dari masuk neraka sama sekali; dalam hal itu, kewajiban mereka hanyalah mengucapkannya, karena mereka tidak diwajibkan untuk beramal. Dan Allah #% Maha Mengetahui. Namun mungkin pernyataan Hudhaifah bermakna bahwa mereka diselamatkan dari api neraka setelah terlebih dahulu harus memasukinya; sehingga implikasi hadith ini mungkin adalah makna yang dimaksud dari hadith Qudsi berikut: "Demi Keagungan dan Keluhuran-Ku, Aku akan mengeluarkan dari neraka siapa pun yang mengucapkan pada hari mana pun: Laailaha illallaah (tidak ada yang berhak disembah kecuali Allah).' Namun begitu, hadith terakhir ini mungkin mengacu pada kelompok orang lain. Kita akan mempelajari ini lebih rinci ketika membahas tingkatan-tingkatan syafaat. Yang penting untuk dicatat di sini adalah bahwa ilmu akan dicabut di akhir zaman dan kebodohan akan merajalela. Dalam hadith yang disebutkan di atas, kita diberitahu bahwa kebodohan akan turun, yang berarti bahwa orang-orang akan diilhami dengannya, dan itu adalah dari ketersesatan, yang kami berlindung kepada Allah #% darinya. Keadaan yang disebutkan itu akan berlanjut seiring manusia semakin bertambah dalam kebodohan dan kesesatan, hingga kehidupan di dunia ini berakhir. Ini diberitahukan kepada kita dalam hadith Nabi #%, "Hari Kiamat tidak akan tiba pada seseorang yang mengucapkan, 'Allah, Allah,' dan ia tidak akan tiba kecuali pada orang-orang yang paling jahat."

44 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

KEBURUKAN-KEBURUKAN YANG AKAN TERJADI DI AKHIR ZAMAN, YANG SEBAGIANNYA SEDANG TERJADI DI ZAMAN KITA

Nabi #4 Berbicara Tentang Keburukan-Keburukan yang Akan Terjadi Setelah Masanya

"Wahai sekalian kaum Muhajirin, lima perkara — jika kalian ditimpa dengannya...dan aku berlindung kepada Allah dari kalian mencapainya: (1) keburukan tidak menyebar di kalangan suatu kaum hingga mereka memproklamirkannya secara terang-terangan kecuali penyakit pes dan kelaparan akan menyebar di antara mereka, hingga tingkatan yang sebelumnya tidak pernah diketahui oleh para pendahulu mereka; (2) orang-orang tidak akan mengurangi takaran (yakni dengan curang dalam timbangan ketika jual beli) kecuali mereka akan ditimpa kekeringan di tanah, kewajiban-kewajiban yang memberatkan, dan kezaliman penguasa atas mereka; (3) mereka tidak akan menolak membayar zakat atas harta mereka kecuali mereka akan dihalangi dari hujan langit, dan seandainya bukan karena ternak, mereka tidak akan mendapat hujan sama sekali; (4) mereka tidak akan melanggar perjanjian Allah dan perjanjian Rasul-Nya #% kecuali musuh-musuh luar mereka akan diberikan kekuasaan untuk menaklukkan mereka, musuh-musuh yang akan mengambil sesuatu dari apa yang ada di tangan mereka; (5) dan selama para imam mereka tidak memerintah dengan Kitab Allah dan mereka mengejek apa yang Allah turunkan, Allah #% akan membuat kekuatan mereka digunakan di antara sesama mereka — satu sama lain." (Ibn Maajah)

Ibn Maajah sendirian yang meriwayatkan hadith ini dan ada beberapa keghariban di dalamnya. 'Alee ibn Abee Taalib # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Ketika umatku melakukan lima belas perkara, musibah menimpanya." Ditanyakan, "Dan apakah itu, wahai Rasulullah #8?" Beliau berkata,

1) Ketika ghanimah (rampasan perang) ditumpuk oleh sebagian anggota masyarakat saja; 2) ketika orang-orang mengambil untuk diri mereka sendiri hal-hal yang dititipkan kepada mereka sebagai amanah, menganggap hal-hal itu sebagai harta rampasan; 3) ketika zakat diambil secara paksa dari orang-orang (seolah-olah mereka merasa itu beban atau pajak); 4 dan 5) ketika seorang laki-laki menaati istrinya tetapi mendurhakai ibunya; 6

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 45

dan 7) ketika seorang laki-laki memperlakukan temannya dengan baik tetapi bersikap kasar dan menjauh dari ayahnya; 8) ketika suara-suara diangkat di masjid-masjid; 9) ketika pemimpin suatu kaum adalah individu paling rendah di antara mereka; 10) ketika seseorang dimuliakan karena keburukannya ditakuti; 11) ketika minuman keras akan diminum; 12) ketika sutera akan dipakai (oleh laki-laki); 13) ketika penyanyi-penyanyi perempuan akan digunakan; 14) ketika alat-alat musik akan digunakan; 15) ketika generasi terakhir umat ini melaknat generasi pertamanya...pada saat itu tunggulah angin merah, atau amblesnya bumi, atau transformasi manusia (menjadi binatang). (At-Tirmidhee)

At-Tirmidhee kemudian berkata, "Hadith ini Gharib; kami tidak mengetahuinya dari 'Alee kecuali melalui sanad ini...beberapa ulama telah memberi komentar atas hafalan salah satu perawinya, Abu Al-Farj ibn Fudaalah. Dan dalam riwayat lain, 'Alee ibn Abee Taalib berkata,
content_ar: يُحرَّم To الأمل For الموت الكتاب of The End ; Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 41 الرحمة on me. And إذا You wish a الابتلاء for a people, then. take me to You with الموت, without me being put to الابتلاء. O الله, I ask You (to gtant me) Your المحبة, the المحبة of those who المحبة You, and the المحبة of every deed that brings me closer to Your المحبة.” (أحمد) These narrations indicate that there will come a very severe and difficult time upon the people, عندما the المسلمون will not have Jamaa’ah established upon the الحق — this is either for the entire earth or some parts of it. العلم Will Be Raised With The الموت Of The العلماء النبي ﷺ #@ Intimated To Us That A Group From This Nation Will Remain Upon The الحق حتى The يوم القيامة In another الحديث, النبي ﷺ #% said, “From my Nation there shall continue to remain a group that is victorious upon the الحق; they will not be harmed by those who forsake them or by those who oppose them. (This will continue) حتى الله’s Matter arrives (this is referring to عندما the Hour is near at hand, عندما الله 8% will take the الحياة of every male and female المؤمن), عندما they will still be upon that state.” A Narration Which Indicates That Every 100 Years, الله 3 Will Send For This Nation He (Or Those) Who Will Revive The Affairs Of The Religion 42 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations Abu Daawood was the only one to relate this narration. Every group says that their الإمام is being referred to in this الحديث. Yet it appears, and الله 2% knows best, that it is comprehensive of a group of العلماء from every group and from every branch of العلم — مثل Tafseer, الحديث, Figh, Arabic Grammar, the Arabic language in general, and other branches as well. And الله 8 knows best. أما the الحديث of ‘Abdullah ibn ‘Amr 4, “Verily, الله a does not seize العلم by force, taking it forcefully from the people; rather, He %% takes away العلم by the الموت of the العلماء,” its manifest meaning is that العلم is not taken from the breasts of men بعد الله 4 has endowed them with it. Some Of The Signs Of The Hour That النبي ﷺ # Mentioned Qataadah reported that أنس ibn Maalik .& said, “Shall I not relate to you a Hadeeiht | heard from الرسول ﷺ of الله #%, which none will relate to you بعد me? I heard him say that, ‘from the signs of the Hour is the raising (or taking) of العلم; ignorance will spread, fornication will become rampant, alcohol will be imbibed, men will perish, and women will remain, حتى there remains one male guardian for every 50 women.” (Ibn Maajah) العلم Will Be Raised (Or Taken Away) From Peop e At The End Of Time ‘Abdullah # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “Just قبل the Hour there will be days عندما العلم will be raised, عندما ignorance will descend, and عندما there will be much killing.” (Ibn. Maajah) Hudhaifah ibn Al-Yamaan 4 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2 said, “الإسلام will perish (i.e, العلم will perish and its traces will be effaced) like the embroideries of a garment perish, حتى (the time) عندما الصيام, الصلاة, worship, and الصدقة will not be known; عندما in one night forgetfulness will pass over the الكتاب (the Qur’an) and not a single الآية from it will remain on the earth. A group of people will remain — the aged man and woman — who will say, “We were around عندما our الأب was upon this word: Laailaha illallaeh (none has the الحق to be worshipped but الله), but they will not know what is الصلاة, الصيام, worship, or الصدقة.” Silah الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 43 This proves that العلم will be taken from the people near the end of this الدنيا, a time عندما the forgetfulness of the القرآن الكريم will pervade the earth — in the Masaahif and in the breasts of men. And people will remain without العلم. The aged man and woman will say that they were around عندما people would say: ‘Laailaha illallaah,’ and they will say it seeking closeness to الله 3% by it. It will benefit them حتى وإن they do not otherwise have الخير deeds or beneficial العلم. Perhaps the meaning of “it will save them from the النار” is that their saying the phrase of tawhid will save them from entering the النار altogether; in that case, the only الالتزام upon them is to say it, بما أن they are not required to do deeds. And الله %% knows best. But perhaps Hudhaifah’s statement means that they are saved from the Fire بعد أولاً having to enter it; لذا the implications of this الحديث may be the intended meaning of the following Qudsee الحديث: “By My Greatness and Exaltedness, I will remove from the النار whoever says on any day from time: Laailaha illallaah (none has the الحق to be worshipped but الله),’ But still, this last الحديث might be referring to another group of people. We will study this in more detail عندما discussing the levels of intercession. What is المهم to note here is that العلم will be raised at the end of time and ignorance will become rampant. In the aforesaid Hadeeih we are told that ignorance will descend, أي that people will be inspired by it, and that is from forsakenness, which we seek refuge from الله 3%. Tقال state of affairs will continue as people increase in ignorance and misguidance, حتى الحياة on this الدنيا ends. This we are informed of in the الحديث of النبي ﷺ #%, “The Hour will not arrive upon anyone who says, ‘الله, الله,’ and it will not arrive except upon the most الشر of people.” 44 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations EVILS THAT WILL OCCUR AT THE END OF TIMES, OF WHICH SOME ARE TAKING PLACE IN OUR AGE النبي ﷺ #4 Spoke Of Evils That Were To Occur بعد His Time “O group of Muhaajireen, five practices — إذا you are afflicted with them...and I seek refuge in الله from you reaching them: (1) الشر does not spread throughout a people to the extent that they proclaim it openly except that plague and hunger will spread among them, to such a degree that was previously unknown by their predecessors; (2) people will not reduce in measurement (i.¢., by cheating with scales عندما buying and selling) except that they will be overtaken by drought in the lands, by burdensome obligations, and by the oppression of the ruler upon them; (3) they will not refuse to pay Zakaat on their الثروة except that they will be prevented rain from the sky, and were it not for livestock, they would not receive rain (altogether); (4) they will not break الله’s covenant and the covenant of His Messenger #% except that their external enemies will be given reign to subjugate them, enemies that will take something from what is in their hands; (5) and as long as their Imams do not rule by الله’s الكتاب and they smock what الله revealed, الله 3 will make their القوة to be used among themselves — against بعضهم بعضاً.” (Ion Maajah) Tbn Maajah was alone in relating the narration and it does have some Gharaabah (strangeness) in it. ‘Alee ibn Abee Taalib # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “عندما my nation does fifteen practices, calamity befalls it.” It was asked, “And what are they, O Messenger of الله #8?” قال, 1) عندما the spoils of war are hoarded by some members of المجتمع only; 2) عندما people take for themselves things that are left with them as a trust, considering those things to be booty; 3) عندما Zakaat is taken unwillingly from the people (as إذا they feel it is a burden or tax); 4 and 5) عندما a man obeys his الزوجة but disobeys his الأم; 6 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 45 and 7) عندما a man treats his friend well but is harsh and distant with his الأب; 8) عندما voices are raised in mosques; 9) عندما the leader of a people is the most base individual among them; 10) عندما a man is honored لأن his الشر is feared; 11) عندما alcohol will be imbibed; 12) عندما silk will be worn (by men); 13) عندما female singers will be used; 14) عندما musical instruments will be used; 15) عندما the last of this nation curses the أولاً of it..at that point wait for a red wind, or the sinking of the earth, or for people to be transformed (into animals). (At-Tirmidhee) At-Tirmidhee then said, “This Hadeeh is Ghareeb; we do not know it from ‘Alee except through this chain...some العلماء have made remark upon the memory of one of its narrators, Abu Al-Farj ibn Fudaalah. And in another narration, ‘Alee ibn Abee Taalib said,
